teaching.title: Author, Node.js/Express Application Guide
descriptions: Compiled personal course notes into a step-by-step quick-start guide for building and deploying a database-backed Express application, from project initialization through deployment on AWS EC2, with runnable code at each step
Expanded and formalized the guide the following year to serve as a companion reference during the Node.js unit, adding terminology definitions and library documentation
Published at fisherandrew.org and shared with subsequent IS cohorts for continued student use

teaching.title: Program Director, Kids Who Code
descriptions: Taught weekly Python programming classes to 25+ elementary school students across a full semester
Designed lessons that introduced programming fundamentals to students with no prior technical background

teaching.title: Security Champion
descriptions: Selected as team Security Champion; deliver monthly security training to engineering team and serve as the team's first point of review on secure development practices

jobs.title: Software Engineer
descriptions: Build production AI agents that generate data-driven insights for HR managers, including a subagent to evaluate individual time-off usage through standard-deviation and recency analysis to surface burnout risk, feeding a downstream agent that produces natural-language recommendations
Architected and shipped InsightsBar, a shared carousel component consumed by other product teams, establishing a single consistent insights UI across the application

Delivered the complete front-end effort to migrate all BambooHR customers (30,000+ companies) from the legacy reports experience to a new custom report builder platform, including filter and sort controls, bug remediation, in-app states directing customers through the transition, and pagination and shared state management to scale the reports page for post-migration data volumes

Designed and delivered a permissions-based routing system to programmatically generate the reporting application's React Router routes with permissions bound to each page, eliminating an entire class of outages, and simplifying developer experience
Built reliable back-navigation with fallbacks across the reporting application, spanning both the legacy frontend and micro-frontend architectures

jobs.title: Full Stack Developer / Systems Manager
descriptions: Designed and implemented a centralized email template management system in Python/Django, consolidating creation, updating, and deployment of 40+ client-facing templates
Built and deployed a custom IT support ticketing system, and configured CRM automations that streamlined data management across the company
Authored training materials, including slide decks and activity diagrams, for multiple employee position groups to support onboarding and skill development

projects.name: thread-ui
projects.description: Author and maintainer of an open-source React component library (TypeScript, Panda CSS, CVA), with over 40 components, foundational design system and customizable theme. Published to npm under MIT license with a Storybook documentation site at thread.fisherandrew.org, deployed via a Dockerized CI/CD pipeline

projects.name: fisherandrew.org
projects.description: Self-hosted Next.js personal site running on a home Ubuntu server behind Cloudflare, with a blue/green Docker deployment pipeline via GitHub Actions

projects.name: Set
projects.description: SwiftUI implementation of the Set card game; MVVM architecture and application state management. Built in IS 543 coursework (github.com/fisherbyu)

projects.name: Meal En Place
projects.description: SwiftUI recipe application with SwiftData persistence. Built in IS 543 coursework (github.com/fisherbyu)

skills: Languages & Frameworks: TypeScript/JavaScript, React, Next.js, Python, Swift/SwiftUI, C#, SQL, ASP.NET Core, Django
Tools & Practices: Xcode, Git, Docker, Agile, CI/CD, generative AI development tools including Claude Code

Volunteer Representative, The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints - Cauayan, Philippines (Aug 2018 - Mar 2020). Taught a structured curriculum in Tagalog to individuals and families; trained and mentored new representatives in language, protocol, effective teaching, and goal setting; coordinated with regional leadership
Deputy Campaign Manager, Kiley for Assembly
Building electric guitar; play acoustic guitar; enjoy cooking and baking
